nasb.text: the former proclaim Christ out of selfish ambition rather than from pure motives, thinking to cause me distress in my imprisonment.

esv.text: The former proclaim Christ out of selfish ambition, not sincerely but thinking to afflict me in my imprisonment.

cnv.text: 那些人傳講基督卻是出於自私，動機並不純正，只想加重我在捆鎖中的煩惱。

ccb.text: 前者传讲基督是出于个人野心，动机不纯，以为可以增加我在狱中的痛苦。

csbs.text: 前者传讲基督是出于争竞，不是出于真诚，想要在我的捆锁中，增加我的患难。
